---
name: Game submission
about: Submit a wick game to the lantern store
title: "[store] <game title> <version>"
labels: game-submission
---

## Game

- **Title**:
- **id** (reverse-DNS, e.g. com.you.mygame):
- **Version**:
- **Price**: free / $X.XX (developers keep 85%)
- **.lant package**: attach it to this issue, or link a release

## Checklist

- [ ] Written in wick (`lantern_pack` accepted the folder)
- [ ] `game.info` is filled in (id, title, version, author)
- [ ] Holds 60 fps on a modern laptop (`games/stress` levels of headroom)
- [ ] Entirely my own work or properly licensed (art, audio, code)
- [ ] Finishable: a player can reach an ending or a clear loop

## Anything the reviewer should know?

<!-- controls, how long a run takes, secrets we should see -->
